figures.caption: Figure 1: Overall results on all the downstream tasks.

Table 1: Zero-shot results of the multimodal retrieval, product classification, and attribute prediction tasks on our MBE3.0 benchmark. Both Qwen3-VL-Embedding and GME-Qwen2VL are based on 2B-parameter models. “Dim.” denotes the raw dimension of representations output by the model.

Table 2: Zero-shot results of the multimodal retrieval and product classification tasks on the M5Product and Fashion200K benchmarks. Both Qwen3-VL-Embedding and GME-Qwen2VL are based on 2B-parameter models.

Figure 3: Pipeline of ourMOON3.0. Each element in the training triplet (query, positive, and negative items) is represented in three modalities: image-only, text-only, and multimodal (image and text) modalities. “Attr.” denotes product attributes.
